response.justification: Bogdan exceeds the minimum experience requirement with 20 years in software engineering and strong staff-level credentials across full-stack development. His current role shows direct engagement with AI infrastructure and agentic workflows. However, the position requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms'—his AI experience appears recent and infrastructure-focused rather than product-driven. Additionally, the director-level responsibilities around strategic advisory and customer influence are not evident in his background, and the preferred Master's/PhD in AI is absent.
strengths: 20 years of software engineering experience with consistent progression to Staff level, exceeding the 15-year minimum and demonstrating sustained technical leadership
Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) frameworks at re:cinq, showing hands-on engagement with cutting-edge AI technologies
Exceptional technical depth across multiple domains (full-stack, cloud, embedded, infrastructure) with proficiency in 10+ languages and deep expertise in DevOps, architecture, and system design
concerns: AI experience is recent (within last 1-2 years) and primarily infrastructure-focused; lacks demonstrated track record of shipping AI-powered products or platforms at scale
No Master's degree or PhD despite the preferred 'AI-related field' education requirement for a principal-level AI strategy role
No evident background in customer advisory, strategic consulting, or external thought leadership on cloud/AI adoption—key responsibilities for a director-level role

key_factors.factor: Recent AI infrastructure work vs. product shipping gap
Missing advanced degree in AI despite preferred requirement
